heading: Participation by Federal credit unions in Federal, State, and private student loan insurance programs
label: 292k Participation by Federal credit unions in Federal, State, and private student loan insurance programs
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, Federal credit unions shall, pursuant to regulations of the Administrator of the National Credit Union Administration, have power to make insured loans to eligible students in accordance with the provisions of this subpart relating to Federal insured loans.
